title: Outlined Ores +
description: This resource pack adds clean, visible borders around all ores to make them easier to spot while mining.
body:
# Ore Borders
### A Minecraft Resource Pack

This resource pack enhances your mining experience by adding **clean and visible borders** around every ore block in the game — including **deepslate and Nether variants**.  
No more missing diamonds hidden in dark caves or mistaking copper for stone!

The bordered design keeps Minecraft’s original style intact while improving ore visibility, making it perfect for survival players, miners, and speedrunners alike.  

### Features
- Borders for **all ores** (Overworld, Deepslate, and Nether)
- **High visibility** without breaking the vanilla aesthetic  
- Fully compatible with **Minecraft 1.17+**
- Works with most **shader packs** and **optifine-based clients**

### Details
- Game: **Minecraft Java Edition**  
- Pack Format: **8+** (compatible with 1.18 and newer)  
- Resolution: **16x (default)**  

---

Happy mining, and may your next cave be full of diamonds! 💎
